description: RED: add failing test for allowing follow-up edit after successful fresh write in same session

asi.hypothesis: A fresh file created by a successful write in the same session should be immediately editable without an extra read.
asi.rollback_reason: New test fails because read-before-write only tracks prior read calls, not fresh writes.
asi.next_action_hint: Track successful fresh writes as a trusted knowledge source for subsequent edits.
asi.failure_mode: edit remained blocked after successful write tool_result
